label: Pro B cell
evidence: The label 'Pro B cell' is used by the authors in the cell type annotations of the prenatal skin atlas (Gopee et al., 2024, doi:10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x). Pro-B cells represent an intermediate stage in B cell development between pre-pro-B cells and pre-B cells, characterized by VDJ heavy chain rearrangement and expression of B cell transcripts MS4A1, CD79B, DNTT and HLA-DRA (Popescu et al., 2019).
